direct.title: Files, directly between devices.
direct.description: One device sends, the other receives. A short code connects them so files can stream directly.

keepOpen.title: Keep both apps open.
keepOpen.description: Files stream directly between devices — there is no cloud. Closing or backgrounding the app will cancel the transfer.

encrypted.title: End-to-end encrypted.
encrypted.description: No servers, no copies, no middlemen. Your files travel peer-to-peer between you and the recipient.
